_purpose: Phase 2 of 1:1 SMS pivot. Verifies that a fresh planner texting Rally with planning intent gets an auto-created session + a join-link URL back in one round-trip. Sender phone has no prior session — should land in handleNewPlannerInbound, detectPlanningIntent should fire, createPlannerSessionWithJoinLink should mint the session and link.
_post_run_assertions: trip_sessions has a row with planner_user_id matching +15551320001's user, trip_model='1to1', destination='Yosemite', phase='INTRO'
trip_session_participants has the planner row with is_planner=true, is_attending=true, status='active'
join_links has a row for the new trip_session_id with use_count=0
PostHog 'sms_planner_session_created_from_text' event fired with hasIntent=true, hasDestination=true

messages.body: Plan a Yosemite trip with my friends
messages._note: First message from a fresh planner, planning intent + destination → expect auto-session + join URL
